challenges.area: Deck builders miss calls on the job site
challenges.impact: Every missed call is a $10K–$25K job going to a competitor who picked up. They already know this — you're just showing them the number

challenges.area: No automated follow-up in the industry
challenges.impact: Most contractors follow up manually — or don't at all. The market is wide open for what we offer
A roofing client booked 550+ calls that would have gone to voicemail and died. Same problem, same solution — different trade
Deck builders are ramping up now. They're feeling the lead pressure. Timing is perfect

approach.body:
Arcaflow AI builds systems that recover missed calls, follow up automatically, and book jobs — without anyone on the client's team lifting a finger. We serve local service businesses (roofers, deck builders, HVAC, landscapers) who are great at their trade but losing revenue every day to slow response times.

Your role is the first point of contact. You're not pitching software — you're showing business owners money they're already losing and getting them in front of Thomas for a 20-minute demo. That's it.

points.label: The Vertical
points.description: Deck builders — local, established, high inbound call volume, systematically underserved. Start here, expand to HVAC/roofing/landscaping once proven

points.label: The Story
points.description: Roofing client, same problem — booked 550+ calls that would have died. Use this on every call

points.label: The Geography
points.description: US-based businesses, starting in TX, FL, NC, GA, OH — high housing activity, peak outdoor season

items.activity: Read the script 3x aloud before your first call
items.benefit: It needs to feel natural, not scripted — reading it aloud is the only way to get there
Week 1 is about getting your rhythm. Results aren't judged until week 2
One booked call in week 1 means the system is working — build from there

items.activity: Log every dial in Nextdial, every booked call in GHL
items.benefit: Clean tracking from day 1 — this is how we measure and improve together
At 80 dials/day across Thu–Sun, the funnel math closes 1 client every 1–2 weeks
This is the core output metric — everything else flows from here
Quality qualification matters — a no-show is a wasted booking
Warm leads from paid ads join the pipeline alongside cold — higher close rate, same commission
Who to call, who to skip, 3 qualifying questions, pain signals to listen for
Full script from opener to booking — including what to say when they say no
7 word-for-word responses to the most common pushbacks

items.activity: Lead List — 500+ deck builders (TX, FL, NC, GA, OH)
items.benefit: Provided before Day 1 — loaded into Nextdial, ready to dial

bonuses.detail: Warm leads from paid ads added to your pipeline alongside cold calls — higher close rate, same commission structure
Hit 80+ dials/day, 4+ calls/week, 70%+ show rate, and 1+ close in a month — you're at 15% from that point forward
As Arcaflow scales, your territory expands and you build a team under you. The callers who stick around get the best deals

next_steps: Read the script 3x aloud before your first call
Review the ICP brief — know who to call and who to skip
Get access to Nextdial and load the lead list
Make your first 20 dials — not to book, just to warm up
Text Thomas after your first session

terms.detail: Commission-only. Per booked call (qualified, attends) + per closed client
Lead agrees to a discovery call, provides email, and shows up. No-shows do not count
Reviewed monthly. All 4 KPIs must be hit to unlock the 15% rate: 80+ dials/day, 4+ calls/week, 70%+ show rate, 1+ close
Added from month 2 subject to ad campaign performance. Thomas controls allocation
Every booked discovery call must be logged in GHL immediately with name, phone, and email to qualify for commission
